climate.description: Typical Flemish April: cool, damp, windy – perfect for testing Flandrien mettle.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 79. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 74.

course_description.character: Punchy hellingen and vicious cobbled sectors through Flemish Ardennes, evoking Tour of Flanders suffering in self-paced glory.
course_description.signature_challenge: Conquer all 59 marked berg & cobble Strava segments within 72 hours for your engraved stone on the Wall of Fame.
suffering_zones: Oude Kwaremont - Paterberg - Koppenberg finale: Legendary triple-threat combo; relentless cobbled ascents that break souls in the Tour of Flanders.
Day 2 Main Course: 190km with 12 climbs and 7 cobbled sectors; endless unheralded ups where true Flandriens earn their spurs.
West Flanders Starter: Ypres to Oudenaarde via Ghent-Wevelgem cobbles; 75km appetizer with 914m vert to whet the appetite.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Leopold Hotel Oudenaarde recommended; cycling-friendly with bike storage.
logistics.transport: Self-supported Strava challenge based in Oudenaarde; optional guided tours with Sportive Breaks include transfers, meals, mechanics.

history.origin_story: Modern Strava-era challenge visualizing digital segments on Flanders' sacred roads; rewards completers with physical monument.

final_verdict.one_liner: Ultimate Flandrien proving ground – suffer on hallowed cobbles, claim immortality in stone.

citations.label: Flandrien Challenge. The unbelievable ride - YouTube
